# DO NOT EDIT THIS DIRECTORY

The files in this directory are **auto-generated** from the F-04 error registry.

**Source:** `src/_generated/error-registry.json` (fetched from `irongate-server`)
**Generator:** `irongate-docs/scripts/generate-error-docs.ts`

To add or update an error code, register it in
`irongate-server/apps/server/src/errors/registry.ts` and push to main.
The `check-error-registration.js` pre-commit hook ensures all error codes
are registered before use.
